info.title: ClientCasa API
info.description: REST API for ClientCasa — proposals, contracts, time tracking, expenses, invoicing, payments, and CRM for solo operators and small teams.

post.description: Status `paid`, `partial`, and `overdue` are system-derived from Payments and the due date; do not set them directly.

patch.summary: Update an invoice (line items not editable in v1)

post.summary: Create a proposal (metadata only — rich-text content is dashboard-managed)
post.description: Creates a draft proposal. The narrative content (Tiptap document) and line items are not editable via the v1 API; use the dashboard.

patch.description: Status transitions to `accepted`/`rejected`/`expired` are system-driven; do not set them directly.

post.description: Creates a draft contract. Signing flow, signer assignment, and Tiptap content are dashboard-managed.

patch.description: Only `title`, `effectiveDate`, `expirationDate`, and `archived` are editable via v1. `title`/`effectiveDate`/`expirationDate` are draft-only; `archived` is always editable.

post.description: Records a manually-collected payment (check, bank transfer, cash, etc.). Stripe payments are recorded automatically via webhooks and cannot be created here. Payments are immutable after creation except for `reference` and `notes`. To reverse a payment, record a refund (kind=refund, negative amount, refundOfId pointing at the original).

patch.summary: Update a payment (notes/reference only — payments are otherwise immutable)

patch.description: Time entries billed to a paid invoice cannot be edited (the date field is immutable in that case).

delete.description: Time entries billed to a paid invoice cannot be deleted.

post.description: Milestones attach to either a project or a proposal — `parentType` + `parentId` are both required.
Only manually-created events accepted via API; events synced from Google/Outlook/Apple are read-only.
Inquiries created via the API land in `new` status. Conversion (to Client + Project) is dashboard-only in v1.

patch.description: Status `converted` is terminal and set by the dashboard conversion flow. Transitions out of `converted` or `spam` are blocked.
Transactions billed to a sent/paid invoice may be frozen — the server will return 409 if so.

delete.description: Transactions billed to a sent/paid invoice cannot be deleted.

post.description: `type: expense` items track cost; `type: charge` items track revenue.
Creates a webhook endpoint. URL must be HTTPS. If `secret` is provided, every delivery includes an `X-Signature: sha256=…` header computed over `${X-Webhook-Timestamp}.${body}`.

patch.description: Pass `secret: null` to remove the signing secret. Pass a new string to rotate.
